title: HCA Healthcare Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on HCA Healthcare. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what HCA is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale: Westmount Research. "HCA Healthcare (HCA) Intrinsic Value: A DCF Analysis." westmountfundamentals.com, March 19, 2026.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)
discountRate.rationale: " data-astro-cid-igrglyo7>Based on a 4.18% 10Y Treasury yield, a 5.5% equity risk premium, and HCA's beta. Weighted average cost of capital incorporates their substantial debt load.

terminalGrowth.title: Terminal Growth Rate
terminalGrowth.rationale: " data-astro-cid-igrglyo7>Assumed perpetual growth rate after year 5. Set at 2.5%, slightly below historical GDP growth, representing a mature, stable state.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).

faq.question: Why use a WACC of 8.5%?
faq.answer: Westmount Research. "HCA Healthcare (HCA) Intrinsic Value: A DCF Analysis." westmountfundamentals.com, March 19, 2026.
